title: amethysttool
description: Amethyst Tools adds powerful time-based Netherite tools with special abilities like 3x3 Mining, Tree Feller (32 logs), and Auto-Replant. Fully configurable, protection compatible, and optimized for Paper & Folia.
body:
Amethyst Tools is a professional, lightweight Minecraft plugin that introduces powerful time-based Netherite tools with unique abilities.

✨ Features

⛏ Amethyst Pickaxe
3x3 mining based on the block face direction.

🪓 Amethyst Axe
Tree Feller that breaks up to 32 connected logs.

🌾 Amethyst Hoe
Automatically replants fully grown crops.

⏳ Time-Based System

Tools are given with a custom duration (e.g. 1h, 7d, 30m).

When the time expires, the tool is automatically removed.

No use-based system.

Persistent incremental numeric IDs.

⚙ Fully Configurable

Enable/disable each tool individually.

Enable/disable each ability separately.

Editable messages.

Customizable lore layout.

Custom materials.

Clean small-font styled display names.

🛡 Protection Compatible

Fully respects:

WorldGuard

Claim plugins

Plot systems

Any BlockBreakEvent cancellation

Every additional block is individually checked.

🚀 Technical

Built for Paper / Folia 1.21.8+

PersistentDataContainer based

Clean OOP structure

Optimized and lightweight
